ddls:
CREATE TABLE "historical_figures" (
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical figure */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the historical figure */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the historical figure */,
  "disambiguation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the figure has disambiguation issues */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the biography in characters */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title associated with the historical figure */,
  "score" REAL /* Score representing the historical significance of the figure */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the historical figure */,
  "field_of_influence" TEXT /* Field of influence of the historical figure (e.g., politics, science) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image representing the figure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the figure was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the figure's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biographies" (
  "bio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biography */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the historical figure */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full content of the biography */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the biography was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the biography was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the biography */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the biography */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biographies_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_reception" (
  "reception_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reception entry */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the historical figure */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the reception metrics */,
  "pageviews" INTEGER /* Number of pageviews for the figure's biography */,
  "revisions" INTEGER /* Number of revisions made to the biography */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by users */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews written about the figure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reception_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_reception_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "figure_id_1" INTEGER /* First historical figure involved in the relationship */,
  "figure_id_2" INTEGER /* Second historical figure involved in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, mentor, rival) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_figure_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id_1") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_figure_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id_2") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the historical figure associated with the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the historical event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the researcher account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the contribution */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure being contributed to */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., added biography, added event) */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the note */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure the note pertains to */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the research note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_notes_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_notes_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the historical figure */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score entry */,
  "score" REAL /* Score representing the historical significance of the figure */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who authored the publication */,
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical figure the publication addresses */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_figure_id FOREIGN KEY ("figure_id") REFERENCES historical_figures ("figure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the research group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group's research focus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the group was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research group */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the group (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES research_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
